description: You are a DevOps Engineer performing morning triage. Identify all emails in the Inbox containing 'fail', 'error', 'bug', or 'problem' in their Subject line (case-insensitive). Move these emails into a new folder named 'Build-Alerts' and mark them as Unread. Forward the most recent email in the 'Build-Alerts' folder to 'build-master@company.com' with the message: 'Critical build failure detected. Please investigate immediately.' Log the exact Subject lines of all moved emails, one per line, to ~/Documents/triage_log.txt.
